mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shows (movie_id, hall_id, start_time, end_time, base_price, final_price, status) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{hallId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{basePrice}, #{finalPrice}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE shows SET movie_id = #{movieId}, hall_id = #{hallId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, base_price = #{basePrice}, final_price = #{finalPrice}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shows WHERE movie_id = #{movieId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM shows WHERE hall_id = #{hallId}
